CreateSupportPlanSchedule.description: Grants permission to create support plan schedules for this AWS account

GetSupportPlan.description: Grants permission to view details about the current support plan for this AWS account

GetSupportPlanUpdateStatus.description: Grants permission to view details about the status for a request to update a support plan

ListSupportPlanModifiers.description: Grants permission to view a list of all support plan modifiers for this AWS account

StartSupportPlanUpdate.description: Grants permission to update the support plan for this AWS account
